title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Preview and chat with Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on iPhone
description: When opening a Microsoft Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on iPhone, users will get a preview experience where they can use Copilot Chat to command and ask questions about the files directly in the preview. This enables immediate access to Copilot Chat in a user's file.

title: Outlook: File tab in Ribbon
description: The File tab provides new Outlook users with the ability to easily discover account info, settings, PSTs, and more directly from the ribbon. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Collection policies support in IRM
description: With this update, IRM will start supporting collection policies. Collection policies allow customers to scope classification (SITs - Sensitive Information Types) and activities for scoped users. For device indicators based IRM policy, required collection policies will be automatically created in the background. Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management correlates various signals to identify potential malicious or inadvertent insider risks, such as IP theft, data leakage, and security violations. Insider Risk Management enables customers to create policies to manage security and compliance. Built with privacy by design, users are pseudonymized by default, and role-based access controls and audit logs are in place to help ensure user-level privacy.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Chat - Session Persistence Enhancement
description: This feature ensures that conversations are preserved even when users navigate away from a session. As soon as a prompt is submitted, an entry is immediately created in the navigation pane’s session history. This allows users to leave the session and return later just as if they had never left. The update enhances continuity and reliability, making it easier to navigate without losing progress.

title: Microsoft Teams: Collaborate using Pages in Channels
description: We are bringing Pages to your Teams Channel experience. Create and collaborate using Pages directly in any of your channels.

title: Microsoft Teams: Raise hands in Town Hall
description: Currently in a Teams Town hall, attendees cannot raise their hands and share their microphone and camera as they can in a meeting. With this new update, town halls organized by users with Teams Premium will allow attendees to raise their hand like they would in a standard Teams meeting. The ability to raise a hand can signal to organizers and presenters, who can then bring attendees on screen to allow them to share their camera and microphone.

title: Microsoft Teams: Malicious URL Protection for Teams Chat and Channels
description: Microsoft Teams can now detect and warn users on malicious URLs sent in Teams chat and channels, increasing protection against malware attacks.

title: Microsoft Teams: Weaponizable File Type Protection for Teams Chat and Channels
description: Microsoft Teams now blocks messages containing weaponizable file types, such as executables, in chats and channels, increasing protection against malware and other file-based attacks.

title: Microsoft Teams: Facilitator agent for scheduled meetings in Teams Rooms
description: You can take advantage of the Facilitator agent in Teams Rooms on Windows or Android for real-time AI-generated notes, follow up items, and keeping everyone on time during scheduled meetings. Facilitator appears in the meeting chat and participants can toggle between notes, chat, and the agent.  Available in rooms licensed for Teams Rooms Pro. Facilitator for ad-hoc meetings, invoked by QR code scan, is available in public preview.

title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Copilot Employee Experience Outcomes Report with Viva Glint
description: A new Power BI report in Viva Insights highlights the relationships and impact of M365 Copilot usage on employee experience sentiment outcomes in Viva Glint. This report enables robust analysis by allowing users to slice and dice data based on Copilot usage segments, different sentiment outcomes and organizational attributes. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Larger file upload support in Copilot Studio agent builder
description: Copilot Studio agent builder in Microsoft 365 will support larger file uploads of up to 512 MB.

title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Unified Exclusion list
description: Unified Exclusion Lists in Copilot Analytics provide a single, streamlined way for admins to exclude users—both unlicensed and licensed—from all Viva Insights reports and Copilot Dashboard. This ensures consistent, privacy-compliant data control across the entire platform. Admins can manage exclusions easily through one list, simplifying configuration and safeguarding sensitive user data without impacting other organizational HR data.

title: Microsoft Teams: Immersive events in Microsoft Teams
description: Host interactive virtual events with avatars in customizable 3D spaces. Schedule immersive events from your Teams calendar and join events directly in Microsoft Teams on PC or Mac. Organizers can customize an immersive event's 3D space with images, videos, and 3D models, no coding skills required. Attendees can mingle in the 3D space and engage with different features that provide a rich interactive experience.

title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Glint - Export Executive Summary report in Viva Glint to editable PowerPoint slides
description: Managers will be able to export the default sections from the Executive Summary report in Viva Glint directly to editable PowerPoint slides. This enhancement allows for easier and quicker consumption of this report outside Viva Glint, compared to the previous export method which included static screenshots.

title: Microsoft Teams: Simplified device settings for voice and face recognition on Teams Rooms
description: It's easier for admins to enable the benefits of intelligent audio and video and Copilot for users in Teams Rooms through a new user interface, and admin settings. These new settings, on the device and in the Pro Management portal, simplify configuration and remove the requirement to use PowerShell, offering improved visibility across rooms.

title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Expanding access to Diagnostics to Compliance Administrator, Security Administrator and Organization Management
description: We are expanding the access to Diagnostics beyond Global Admin to: Compliance Administrator, Security Administrator and Organization Management

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Admin control for org-wide agent sharing
description: Admins can manage who can create org-wide agent sharing links for agents built in Copilot Studio Agent Builder for improved governance and flexibility of agent sharing. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Microsoft 365: Microsoft 365 companion apps- a suite of apps designed to enhance productivity
description: Microsoft 365 companions is a suite of apps, including People, File Search, and Calendar, designed to enhance productivity through quick access to key tools directly from the Windows 11 taskbar. These lightweight apps integrate seamlessly with Microsoft 365, allowing users to efficiently look up contacts and navigate organization charts, locate files, view calendars and streamline workflows without distractions.

title: Microsoft Teams: Intelligent recap for DoD
description: Intelligent meeting recap uses AI to provide a quick summary of your meeting, highlighting key discussion points, identifying follow-up actions, and offering quick access to significant points such as name mentions, when a screen was shared, individualized speaker markers, topics, and chapters.

title: Microsoft Teams: Support for multiple camera views and IntelliFrame from Teams Rooms on Windows in Teams webinar and structured meetings
description: Multiple camera views and IntelliFrame (Multi-stream and cloud) from Teams Rooms on Windows are now available in Teams webinar and structured meetings with "Manage what attendees see" enabled. Organizers and presenters of these meetings can access intelligent camera views and bring them on the live stage for attendees.  Available with Teams Rooms Pro.

title: Microsoft Teams: Live caption translation in Teams Rooms on Android
description: Users can now choose the translation language you prefer without affecting what other meeting participants see in Teams Rooms on Android. Currently, live captions display in the spoken language by default, this change allows individuals to select their own experience. This feature is available on Teams Rooms Pro.

title: Microsoft Teams: Customize captions on Mobile
description: Live captions are now available on mobile devices with enhanced customization options, making captions easier to read and follow during meetings. You can personalize your captions by adjusting the font color, caption background color, and caption height. These enhancements ensure captions remain accessible and comfortable, especially under varying lighting conditions or when you're on the go.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Insider Risk Management - Personal email triggers
description:
In this update, we are adding the recently added email indicators in Insider Risk Management as triggers. 1.  Sending email with attachments to free public domains - Users will be brought into scope of a policy when business-sensitive data is potentially leaked from a work email account to a free public domain email, potentially leading to a data security incident.  2. Sending email with attachments to self - Users will be brought into scope of a policy when business-sensitive data is potentially leaked from a work email account to user's personal email account or emailing self, potentially leading to a data security incident. 
Admins with appropriate permissions can enable these indicators from the settings page and use these triggers in the data leaks or data leaks by priority users template.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Tip Support in Outlook for Mac
description: DLP policy tips for Microsoft Outlook for Mac provide real-time notifications to users when their email contains sensitive information that violates organizational policies. Users can see policy tips directly in the mail tip UI and have the option to remove non-compliant recipients or override the policy if necessary. This feature ensures compliance by alerting users to potential data loss risks before sending emails.

title: OneNote: Microsoft Purview Sensitivity Labels in OneNote
description: Microsoft Purview Sensitivity Labels in OneNote will allow users to classify and protect OneNote Sections with the same compliance standards available across Microsoft 365 apps. Users will be able to apply labels directly within OneNote, ensuring sensitive content is encrypted, access-controlled, and compliant with the organization's policies.

title: Microsoft Viva: Storyline & Post Enhancements, Cover Photos, Drafts, AMAs, and More
description: Over the course of the next few months, you’ll see a set of updates that make it easier to create, manage, and personalize posts in Viva Engage. These include Storyline cover photos and featured posts to further customize your Storyline page, the ability to draft and schedule posts in advance, support for AMAs, and the ability for a delegate to post-on-behalf-of on Storyline. Whether you're a communicator, leader, or team member, these features will help you engage your audience with greater clarity and customizations.

title: Microsoft Teams: Cloud IntelliFrame support on Teams Rooms on Android
description: Now Cloud IntelliFrame, the AI-based cloud technology that optimizes views of in-room participants for hybrid meetings, is available for Teams Rooms on Android using group framing. It is set as the default in those rooms, while remaining disabled by default in others. Admins can manage this behavior through console settings.

title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Dashboard - M365 Copilot Chat adoption metrics
description: Insights on M365 Copilot Chat adoption for users not licensed for M365 Copilot. Insights will include usage trends over time, adoption by group, retention, and app level breakdowns. Users can filter by organizational attributes to uncover adoption patterns. Admins can disable M365 Copilot Chat insights in Microsoft Admin Center.

title: Microsoft Viva: Live event using Teams Town hall in Viva Engage
description: Community admins can now produce or stream their broadcasts using Teams Town hall, offering higher-quality production and enhanced functionality.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Voice chat in Microsoft 365 Copilot
description: Voice in Microsoft 365 Copilot brings a natural, hands-free conversational experience to your desktop and mobile devices – enabling you to talk to Copilot like a colleague, unlocking a faster, more intuitive way to work. Speak directly to M365 Copilot to search for information, catch up between meetings, brainstorm out loud, and do it all in multiple languages.

title: Microsoft Teams: Chat Notes
description: A new collaborative space is now available directly from your Teams chat, enabling real-time collaboration, organization of key information, and streamlined communications. Chat notes is available in 1:1 and group chat, and is accessible only to the chat members. Add images, format text, share Loop components, and mention chat members when you require their attention.

title: Outlook: Send Button update
description: This feature reduces accidental message sends by moving the send button from the bottom of the compose view, in the compose toolbar to the header of the compose view. By moving the send button to a less crowded location, users can avoid accidental taps, resulting in a more intentional and error-free messaging experience.

title: Microsoft Teams: Enhanced privacy and stability for live captions
description: To improve privacy, when transcription is off, captions will now show only the past five minutes of dialogue instead of the full meeting. If transcription is on, captions display the entire conversation, just like with live transcription. We’re also fixing an issue where changing the caption position could cause data loss—now, moving captions will not affect the text shown. These updates also apply to Real-time Text (RTT), ensuring a consistent and reliable experience.

title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Copilot Studio agent report in Insights enhanced with autonomous agents.
description: Enhancement to Copilot studio agents report (Viva Insights) - 1. Inclusion of agents with "generative" orchestration 2. Autonomous agent adoption and impact (maker led time and cost saving).

title: Outlook: New Scheduling and Event Creation Experience
description: The Outlook and Teams calendars will receive an update to the scheduling and event creation experience. Additionally, new capabilities will be available in this new experience to help streamline and enhance scheduling using Copilot. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Update document sections from new sources
description: Easily refresh parts of your document using content from other files—without copying and pasting. Copilot keeps your formatting intact while pulling in the latest updates from new sources.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Chat Tools Control
description: Tools acts as a lightweight entry point into high-value, task-specific Copilot features and capabilities directly from the prompt box. By selecting Tools, users get a menu where they can easily discover and trigger the right Copilot feature or capability for their current task, while also providing consistent interactions across tools.

title: Microsoft Edge: Ground Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat in Edge for Business in your open YouTube videos
description: Get relevant answers and insights about your open YouTube videos in Copilot Chat in Edge.

title: Microsoft Edge: Ground Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat in Edge for Business in your open OneDrive and SharePoint documents
description: Get relevant answers and insights about your open cloud documents in Copilot Chat in Edge.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Harmful Content Protection Controls in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
description: We’re introducing a new policy setting in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat that gives administrators enhanced control over how users interact with harmful content protection. This feature is designed to support specialized roles—such as legal, investigative, or moderation teams—where exposure to sensitive content may be necessary.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Agent Mode in Word for Enhanced document editing
description: Copilot supports document editing in Word through chat-based interactions with Agent Mode. Users can initiate edits, share clarifying directions, and review a summary of changes within the document.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Chat] Email attachment summarization (Modern Attachments)
description: Users will be able to reason over additional attachment content, along with the email body, in Copilot Chat. Support will be extended to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Pdf, Text, Json and Xml files mentioned in the email as links (Modern Attachments).

title: SharePoint: Updates to News page in SharePoint sites
description: The News page renders news items in a given site. It is typically accessed via the "see all" experience of a news web part.  We are updating the user experience of this page and bringing in Copilot capabilities to licensed users. Updated February 9, 2026: GA rollout for this item is starting in late February. We apologize for any inconvenience.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention -- Always-on diagnostics for macOS endpoints (Phase 1)
description: This feature release ‘Always-on diagnostics’, captures critical diagnostic data from onboarded endpoint devices running on macOS for EDLP issue reporting. Comprehensive trace logs will be automatically recorded and stored locally on onboarded Mac devices, eliminating the need to reproduce issues when submitting investigation requests to Microsoft. It allows for the collection of detailed traces over extended periods (up to 90 days). While raising tickets to submit investigation requests to Microsoft regarding Microsoft Endpoint DLP, customers can share enhanced diagnostic information with Microsoft without needing to reproduce the exact scenario.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention -- Always-on diagnostics for Windows Endpoints (Phase 2)
description: Admins can retrieve diagnostic 'Always-on diagnostic' traces directly from Windows endpoints and selectively upload them to Microsoft through the Purview Portal at the time of an investigation request such as submitting a support ticket, without disrupting end users or impacting their productivity. This eliminates the need for user coordination while maintaining seamless troubleshooting capabilities

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Generating PPT grounded on a Copilot Page
description: Generating PPT grounded on a Copilot Page

title: Microsoft Viva: Enhancement to Copilot studio agents report
description: Following further review, this feature continues in development. We apologize for any inconvenience. Enhancement to Copilot studio agents report (Preview) 1. Addition of Weekly active user count 2. Report aggregation changed to weekly to main consistency with other reports

title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Dashboard - Copilot Chat in Word, Excel, PowerPoint Metrics
description: Copilot Analytics users can now view metrics that reflect Copilot Chat (Work and Web) activity across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. These updates reflect the latest addition of Copilot Chat to these apps to help users transition seamlessly between workflows and will be displayed alongside existing app chat metrics for continuity. The updated metrics are available in the Copilot Dashboard, the M365 Copilot Adoption and Impact PBI reports, with additional query support for all chat prompt metrics.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Dashboard: Copilot Chat (Web) in Teams & Outlook metrics
description: Copilot Analytics users can now view metrics about their Copilot Chat (Web) usage in Teams and Outlook. These updates enable users to better understand both active usage and action counts in Teams and Outlook and will be available in the Copilot Dashboard, as well as with additional query support.

title: Microsoft Intune: Intune Suite - Unattended Remote Help for Windows - Remote Sign-in
description: Remotely access devices over the cloud without requiring end user involvement by signing in with credentials.

title: Microsoft Intune: Intune Suite - Support approvals can now be requested by non-primary users of a device.
description: We're updating Endpoint Privilege Management to allow users who are not assigned as the primary user of a device to initiate support approval requests. Previously, these requests would fail, but with this change, they will be processed successfully.

title: Microsoft Intune: Intune Suite - Endpoint Privilege Management Virtual Account Support
description: EPM will introduce a per-rule option to run elevated apps with the original user's identity context, preserving app data, save locations, and preferences. This offers a more personalized app runtime experience compared to the default virtual account.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Enhanced personalization with memory in Copilot
description: Microsoft 365 Copilot will improve memory in Copilot by increasing the relevance and quality of Copilot responses based on previous communications. This AI-powered capability improves the relevance and quality of Copilot responses by learning from previous communications. These memories are private to the user.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Audio Overview customization in Copilot Notebooks
description: Guide the content of an Audio Overview created for a Copilot Notebook through natural language input.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Updated UI for Copilot Chat Navigation Pane in Outlook
description: The navigation pane has been repositioned from the right side to the left, offering a more intuitive layout. Despite the shift, it continues to host agents and conversation history, ensuring continuity in user experience. This redesign introduces new features, including access to the "All Conversations" page, which provides a comprehensive view of chat history. The change aims to enhance usability and streamline navigation within Copilot Chat.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Updated UI for the Copilot Chat Navigation Pane in Teams
description: The navigation pane has been repositioned from the right side to the left, offering a more intuitive layout. Despite the shift, it continues to host agents and conversation history, ensuring continuity in user experience. This redesign introduces new features, including access to the "All Conversations" page, which provides a comprehensive view of chat history. The change aims to enhance usability and streamline navigation within Copilot Chat.

title: SharePoint: eSignature - Free Text Field Support
description: SharePoint eSignature users would be able to add custom free text fields to their request documents. This new eSignature field can be used to request information (such as address, full name, etc.) from signers.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Extensibility] Delete Schema Properties via Copilot Connector APIs
description:
We’re adding support for property deletion in custom Copilot connectors, giving admins and developers more control over schema evolution. With this feature, you can:
* Use Copilot connector APIs to delete or drop individual schema properties that are no longer needed.
* Keep your connector schema clean and up-to-date without requiring full re-ingestion.
* Reduce developer overhead and simplify maintenance workflows as your data models evolve.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Extensibility] Connector Metadata Enrichment for Custom Copilot Connectors
description:
We’re introducing new options that allow admins and developers to enrich their custom Copilot connectors and its schema properties with descriptive metadata.
With this update, you can now: * Provide richer context about the connection and its schema properties to Copilot’s LLM, enabling more accurate and relevant responses. Add alternate names, data source categories, common actions to your connector and description for schema properties. * Improve search and chat quality by helping Copilot better understand the semantics and purpose of your data.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Extensibility] Simplified People Resolution for Custom Copilot Connectors
description:
This feature enables connectors to resolve external identities—such as email addresses or user IDs from third-party data sources—to their corresponding Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) identities. By allowing flexible identity mapping, developers can:
* Simplify integration workflows without needing complex Graph API lookups.
* Reduce setup friction by avoiding strict dependency on object IDs.
* Improve search and chat relevance in Copilot by ensuring accurate people attribution across connected systems.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Extensibility] Schema Recommendations for Custom Connectors in M365 Admin Center
description:
Accelerate your custom connector development with intelligent schema guidance directly in the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. This feature provides:
* Proposed schema suggestions tailored to the connector you’re building.
* Real-time recommendations to identify gaps or errors in your schema design to help improve search and chat results in Copilot.
Whether you're starting from scratch or refining an existing connector, this enhancement ensures your schema is optimized for Copilot extensibility and performance.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Extensibility] Full refresh of custom connectors datasource
description: Admins and developers can do a full refresh or sync of their datasource for Custom Connectors using Graph APIs. This also ensures that any items deleted in the source are automatically deleted during this full sync and admins do not have to use separate delete APIs to do this.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Extensibility] Customize icons and display names for custom Copilot connectors
description:
1. Add or Customize icons for Custom Copilot connectors using the Graph API or from the M365 Admin Center. 
2. Add or Customize display names for Custom Copilot connectors using the Graph API or from the M365 Admin Center.

title: Microsoft Edge: v.145 - Add “Summarize” and “Explain” Copilot actions in PDF reader
description: Microsoft Edge will expand its existing “Ask Copilot” integration in the built-in PDF reader by introducing two new actions — “Summarize” and “Explain.” These options will allow users to generate a concise overview or simplify complex content within a PDF or selected portion. The new actions build on the existing “Ask Copilot” integration and follow the same enterprise controls and policies.

title: Microsoft Teams: Search for meetings
description: You can now search by meeting name or participant, take direct actions like joining, RSVPing, or viewing recaps, and access a dedicated Meetings tab for a streamlined experience. These updates make it easier to find and act on meetings right from the search bar.

title: Planner: Information Barrier support in Planner
description: Information Barrier (IB) support in Microsoft Planner will enable organizations to restrict access to plans and tasks based on user groups.  IB will help prevent data leakage, enforce internal policies, and support regulatory mandates by limiting plan visibility and collaboration to authorized segments.

title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Information Protection- Scan existing files in SharePoint and OneDrive for business for sensitive information
description: This new capability will enable admins to scan existing files at rest in SharePoint or OneDrive for business for sensitive data.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): On-Canvas Copilot and Private Preview in Shared Pages
description: After making changes to a shared page via chat or on-canvas Copilot, responses appear as private previews, showing content suggestions that you can edit and preview privately before applying them.

title: Viva Glint - Action Taking Analysis Report
description: Introduction of a new report that provides transparency into platform activity by dashboard users. Metrics such as report views, Team Conversations completed, Focus Areas created, and more will be visible and filterable with this report.

title: Microsoft Viva: Focus Area simplification and enhancements
description: Beginning with this feature release, Focus Areas will be associated with survey cycles and goal periods will be retired. Users will be able to select the same Focus Area across multiple cycles. The Focus Area Overview report will be filterable to groups of interest (e.g. managers only). Draft/deleted Focus Areas will no longer be included in Focus Area calculations.

title: Microsoft Teams: Regional Settings Separation
description: Regional Settings Separation in Microsoft Teams is designed to give users full control over UI language, date, and time formats - either synced with their OS or set manually - for a seamless, globally personalized experience that also addresses common synchronization issues.

title: Outlook: Customizable Oversharing dialog for DLP in New Outlook
description: New Outlook for Windows will now support ability to show customizable oversharing dialog for Data Loss Prevention. The support will be to configure custom title, body, business justifications, and dynamic variables/tokens for matched recipients, attachment names, and labels. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Wait on Send for oversharing dialog in New Outlook
description:
New Outlook for Windows will now support Wait on Send for Oversharing.
This feature allows admins to block sending of emails in case DLP policy evaluation is not completed for labeled or sensitive content. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Information Protection - Admin unit scoping in Content Explorer and Data Explorer
description: This feature introduces Admin Unit scoping to both Content Explorer and Data Explorer, enabling more granular visibility and control over M365 data. It ensures that data exploration respects organizational boundaries defined by Admin Units, enhancing compliance and governance.

title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Information Protection - Admin unit scoping in Content Explorer and Data Explorer
description: This feature introduces Admin Unit scoping to both Content Explorer and Data Explorer, enabling more granular visibility and control over M365 data. It ensures that data exploration respects organizational boundaries defined by Admin Units, enhancing compliance and governance.

title: Microsoft Teams: Dedicated download option for tracking all registrations in Webinar
description: Event organizers can now download a distinct registration report (separate from an attendee list) from the Reports section of a Webinar, in order to have visibility and information about all registrants for a particular webinar instance.

title: Word: 3rd party citation add-in in reference tab
description: This integrates popular third-party citation providers under the Word Reference tab, helping users efficiently complete their reference lists.

title: Outlook: Global Address List Redesign
description: The Global Address List, or Address Book, is getting a major visual redesign to make it easier to navigate, show more contact information in the search results list, improve its accessibility, and improve its appearance overall. This window is accessible via the To/Cc/Bcc buttons in the email compose form. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Teams: Emoji Reactions Workflows
description: Seamlessly set up workflows started by emoji reactions in Teams. When a user reacts to a message with an emoji, the workflow will be kicked off to handle support tickets or start a helpdesk workflow.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Recent activity is part of Copilot's dynamic document snapshot in Word
description: Select the Activity tab within the Copilot summary at the top of a document for a summary of recent comments and changes. Choose a time window of 3 days, 1 week, or 2 weeks.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Auto-update document sections from new sources
description: Easily refresh parts of your document using content from other files—without copying and pasting. Copilot keeps your formatting intact while pulling in the latest updates from new sources.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Press and hold Win + C or Copilot key to activate voice on the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
description: Press and hold Win + C keys, or the dedicated Copilot key for applicable devices, and the Microsoft 365 Copilot app will activate voice. With voice, talk to Copilot like a personal assistant - interrupting and redirecting at any time to prepare for the workday, create documents, understand topics, and search for information. This shortcut to activate voice means you don't have to switch between screens to talk with Copilot. Enterprise-grade security and compliance are built in, so conversations stay private while productivity soars.

title: Microsoft Edge: v.140 - Improved Navigation to Extension Surfaces
description: To improve visibility and discoverability, Microsoft Edge is introducing two navigation improvements for extensions.  First, if a user has at least one enabled extension, the puzzle icon will be persistent on the toolbar.  Second, from the Settings and more menu, the Extensions option will allow users to reach edge://extensions and the Edge Add-ons Store directly.

title: Outlook: Save an Event as a Draft on Android
description: You can save a meeting as a draft on your calendar if you aren't ready to send the meeting invites. When composing an event with at least one attendee added, select dismiss and then select Save as a Draft. The draft event will show on your calendar as [Draft] along with the title of the event.

title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - New Pulse customization options
description: Authors will have new options when starting surveys, including choosing to send without pre-defining an audience, and feedback can instead be gathered by sharing a link that people can access the survey and respond through, sending a survey without a specified end date, allowing for longer-term data collection and multiple responses from recipients over time, and collecting identified responses, where answers are attributed to the person who submitted them.

title: Microsoft Clipchamp: Updated Clipchamp video start page
description: The Clipchamp start page new unified hub is a revamped video hub start page experience of a single video destination for creation, discovery & consumption.

title: SharePoint: Sections with Copilot
description:
Sections with Copilot is a new SharePoint authoring tool that allows users to create full-fidelity SharePoint sections with just a prompt. It works by first looking at the context of your page to offer prompt suggestions for what content you need next to offer a starting point. Next, you either select one of those starting points or write your own and optionally ground in a relevant file.
 
Once you click generate, Sections with Copilot then leverages the knowledge and content already inside of your organization and on your page to create rich sections that go beyond just image and text. This could mean meeting transcripts, recent documents, or any other knowledge Copilot has access to, added to an existing page with a click of a button. 
 
If the output section isn't quite right, you can then use AI refinement to make changes to both the content and layout of your section, without ever touching our traditional authoring tools. Some examples include "change the background image", "add John Smith's contact information", or "make the text more professional". You can also get different suggestions by clicking "regenerate" and then choosing your favorite one to refine further. With Sections with Copilot, you can create content faster than ever before, no matter your SharePoint skill level.

title: Microsoft Teams: New VDI solution for Teams optimization in Amazon WorkSpaces
description:
New VDI solution for Teams introduces multimedia offloading and optimization solution for Microsoft Teams when running in Amazon WorkSpaces (Personal and Pools).
Users of the WorkSpaces Client for Windows can enjoy a high-definition experience in virtual desktops, where audio/video/screensharing are offloaded to the user's device and processed by the SlimCore media engine.
This entry applies to WorkSpaces only (AppStream is not supported).

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Summarize email with Copilot chat in Outlook
description: Users without a Microsoft 365 Copilot license can now easily summarize emails in a single click, using Copilot chat. Users must have access to Copilot chat and pinning enabled to utilize. This change is coming to both Classic and New Outlook for Windows #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: External tag in profile cards
description: For users that are external to your organization, an "External" tag will be shown in the top part of their profile card.

title: Microsoft 365 app: Microsoft Places Support to GCCH and DoD
description: "Microsoft Places is an AI-powered workplace app for flexible work. Places helps organizations reimagine flexible work with AI, enables employees to connect more easily in person so that they can make the most of in-office days.

title: Microsoft Viva: View and moderate private community content without being a member
description: This feature enables verified admins and Engage admins to access and moderate private community conversations without needing to be members of those communities. Admins will also be able to manage community settings, ensuring better governance and oversight across Viva Engage.

title: Microsoft Teams: Deploy Teams frontline worker pilot in Teams Admin Center
description: Deploy a frontline worker (FLW) pilot in Teams Admin Center

title: Microsoft 365: SMTP onboarding to App Role Based Access Control
description: We're simplifying how organizations grant applications permission to send email on behalf of mailboxes. Today, customers must manually assign permissions to each individual mailbox using PowerShell, which is time-consuming and inefficient. With this new capability, admins can assign the SMTP.SendAsApp role to an app through App Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), enabling group-based or scoped access to mailboxes. This eliminates the need for per-mailbox configuration and streamlines onboarding for SMTP clients using OAuth. It’s a scalable, secure, and modern approach to managing mailbox access for applications.

title: Microsoft Viva: Unread News Notifications in Connections
description: After further review, this has been delayed to a later date. We apologize for any inconvenience. Users will receive a weekly notification in the Connections apps in Microsoft Teams on mobile and desktop linking them to relevant SharePoint news that they might have missed in the preceding week. This unread news will be available in the "News" tab in the Connections app under the "unread" pill.

title: Outlook: Immersive Search
description: After completing a search in Outlook, a user will see a Copilot entry point that will take them to an LLM generated summary of their search query (emails, Teams messages and documents) within their Copilot side pane. They will be able to interact further with Copilot to dig deeper into these results and take action items accordingly.

title: Microsoft Viva: News AI audio briefing in Connections Mobile
description: This feature provides an AI generated audio overview of top 10 news items in the Viva Connections news reader experience. It plays the 10 audio clips sequentially to help users catch up on top news in a hands-free manner. This experience will be available in the Viva Connections App in Teams mobile on iOS and android.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Easier access to Researcher in Microsoft Word
description: The Researcher agent now has easier entry points on the Word canvas —making it faster to go from idea to polished research report without breaking your flow.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Easier access to Researcher in Microsoft Word
description: The Researcher agent now has easier entry points on the Word canvas —making it faster to go from idea to polished research report without breaking your flow.

title: SharePoint: Signed Adobe & Docusign documents saved to the originating folder
description: Documents signed via Adobe or DocuSign eSignature, when initiated through the SharePoint eSignature platform, will now be saved in the originating SharePoint folder instead of the default Apps folder. The originating folder is the folder where the starting document was  located at the point of eSignature request initiation.

title: Microsoft Entra: Improved Backup and Restore Experience for the Authenticator App on iOS
description: Users of the Microsoft Authenticator app on iOS will be able to back up account names—including Microsoft work or school accounts, Microsoft personal accounts, and third-party accounts like Amazon or Google—using iCloud and iCloud Keychain. This enables secure, end-to-end encrypted backup of account names and TOTP credentials. When setting up a new iOS device, account names will automatically appear in the app, and users can sign in to complete setup.

title: Outlook: Account Manager
description: Users can use the new Account Manager feature to learn more about their Microsoft account, display their profile picture, and add new accounts (if permitted by their organization).

title: SharePoint: Text Editor Copilot 'Refine' update
description: SharePoint is updating the capabilities of its text editor Copilot. Now, you can not only use copilot to rewrite your existing text but also use it to keep writing or add a grounding document. By answering the question "what do you want copilot to change", you can perform any number of refinements to your existing content.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: eDiscovery – Export download with pre-authorized link support
description: This update enhances the export download experience in Microsoft Purview eDiscovery by introducing support for both pre-authorized and non pre-authorized links. Pre-authorized links offer faster downloads and maintain session continuity for a specified duration. Non pre-authorized links require re-authentication after each connection loss and are needed for restricted environments that allow access only to limited Microsoft 365 IP ranges.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Recent activity is part of Copilot's dynamic document snapshot in Word
description: Select the Activity tab within the Copilot summary at the top of a document for a summary of recent comments and changes. Choose a time window of 3 days, 1 week, or 2 weeks.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Recent activity is part of Copilot's dynamic document snapshot in Word
description: Select the Activity tab within the Copilot summary at the top of a document for a summary of recent comments and changes. Choose a time window of 3 days, 1 week, or 2 weeks.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Say "Hey Copilot" to activate voice conversations with the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on Windows
description: With the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on Windows, say “Hey Copilot” to activate real-time voice conversations with Copilot. The wake word keeps you in flow, helping you draft content, analyze data, and get critical insights without having to navigate to a separate app or window. Built for enterprise, it respects your organization’s compliance and privacy settings, activating only when called.

title: Microsoft Purview Compliance Portal: Service health dashboard
description: As a Microsoft Purview user, you'll be able to view outages, service issues, and advisories that might impact your services. This new dashboard will combine the services and solutions health of Purview, Microsoft 365 services, and Azure Cloud Services in one central place in the Purview portal, eliminating the need to go to several places to find this information.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Optical character recognition (OCR) - Support for embedded images in files including Office files in SharePoint and OneDrive
description: Optical character recognition (OCR) scanning enables Microsoft Purview to scan images for sensitive information. With Embedded support, OCR will scan content in DOCX, PPTX, XLSX and PDFs (scanned and hybrid containing searchable text and images). This will be in addition to support for standalone images

title: Microsoft 365 admin center: Agents usage report
description: A new agents usage report will be available in the Microsoft 365 admin center. The report will be scoped to include agents in M365 Copilot and Copilot Chat with usage by both M365 Copilot licensed and unlicensed users. The report will include total active agent users, total active agents, active users segmentation by licensed and unlicensed users, and active users and active agents segmentation by publisher type (i.e. user-created agents, agents built by your org, agents built by Microsoft, agents built by Microsoft partners). The report will also include usage details per user, agent, and user-agent pair. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Microsoft CoPilot (Microsoft 365): List email attachments in M365 Copilot
description: Users will be able to list the file attachments that they received or sent over email in M365 Copilot.

title: Outlook: Play a Sound Rule
description: Users can set up Outlook rules to play a sound or show a desktop alert whenever an email that matches your chosen conditions arrives, whether it’s from a specific person, includes certain words, or meets any other rule criteria you define. These features help you stay alerted to the emails that matter most. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Quick steps in the pop-out ribbon
description: Quick Steps are now integrated into the ribbon of email pop-out ribbon in the new Outlook for Windows and Web. Users can access and execute their configured Quick Steps directly while reading emails in separate windows. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft 365: New Trust Center settings to block file opens using insecure protocols
description: New settings in Trust Center will allow users to restrict or allow file opens using FTP/HTTP protocols and fallback to FrontPage Remote Procedure Call (FPRPC) protocol.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Teams Channels in Context IQ
description: Users will be able to search for and select Teams Channels in the Context IQ menu to help ground their prompts when using Copilot Chat.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Lists in Context IQ
description: Users will be able to search for and select SharePoint Lists through the Context IQ menu to help ground their prompts when using Copilot Chat.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Researcher is in Microsoft Word
description: The Researcher agent now has easier entry points on the Word canvas —making it faster to go from idea to polished research report without breaking your flow.

title: Outlook: Enterprise and Web Grounding for Draft with Copilot
description: Draft with Copilot now has access to your enterprise data to help you craft high quality emails grounded in the right context. You will be able to review the sources used to generate your email draft before you send the mail.

title: Microsoft Teams: SQL-like commands in the search bar
description: Efficiently narrow down your search results by using SQL-like commands in the search bar. Users can quickly filter messages, files, or conversations with precise queries such as from:username, with:username or in:channel.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Improved Python-powered answers in Copilot in Excel
description: Copilot in Excel now provides improved direct answers to your data analysis questions, using Python.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Document snapshot in Word personalizes output
description: The document snapshot helps the user focus faster by surfacing the most important information for them based on their personal context.

title: Microsoft Teams: Preview of multiple camera view in Teams Rooms on Windows
description: When multiple camera views are enabled in Teams Rooms on Windows, the preview video on the front-of-room display and the camera settings dialog will show multiple camera views. This feature allows in-room users to be aware of all camera streams that are simultaneously streaming to remote users. This feature is available with the Teams Rooms Pro license.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Content suggestions in Word
description: Select the Suggestions tab within the Copilot summary at the top of a Word document for suggestions on improving the content of the document.

title: Minecraft Education: Update v1.21.9
description: The "Chase the Clouds" update for Minecraft Education, bringing the version to 1.21.9.

title: Windows 365: Frontline in Shared mode availability for Germany West Central, Korea Central, Korea South
description: Windows 365 Frontline in Shared Mode is expanding to Korea Central, helping frontline workers in these regions to securely share Cloud PCs across shifts.

title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Glint - Delete survey cycles
description: This feature enables Glint Admins to delete survey cycles within a configured program. When a cycle is deleted, all associated data—including reporting—will be removed from the platform. The feature is intended for removing obsolete or test cycles that are no longer needed.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Import Non-M365 data into review set for modern eDiscovery
description: Microsoft Purview modern eDiscovery experience now enables legal and compliance teams to import non-Microsoft 365 data directly into review set as part of the modern eDiscovery workflow. This feature allows organizations to consolidate all their data into a single secure review environment for streamlined review.

title: Microsoft Defender for Office 365: Overview dashboard
description: We are introducing a new Overview dashboard to help customers understand how our product effectively protects their organization environment and digital assets. The overview dashboard focuses on showcasing the effectiveness of our tools, how customers can further amplify this effectiveness and our product’s leading position in comparison to the other non-Microsoft security solutions out there.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot uses enterprise assets hosted on SharePoint OAL or Templafy when creating a slide
description: Once your organization’s assets are integrated into a SharePoint Organization Asset Library (OAL) or connected through Templafy to Microsoft 365 Copilot, you’ll be able to easily create slides using your organization’s approved images.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot uses enterprise assets hosted on SharePoint OAL or Templafy when creating a slide
description: Once your organization’s assets are integrated into a SharePoint Organization Asset Library (OAL) or connected through Templafy to Microsoft 365 Copilot, you’ll be able to easily create slides using your organization’s approved images.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot uses enterprise assets hosted on SharePoint OAL or Templafy when creating a slide
description: Once your organization’s assets are integrated into a SharePoint Organization Asset Library (OAL) or connected through Templafy to Microsoft 365 Copilot, you’ll be able to easily create slides using your organization’s approved images.

title: Microsoft 365 Admin Center: Prepurchase Capacity Packs for Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
description: This feature integrates pre-purchased capacity packs into Microsoft 365 admin center for M365 Copilot Chat. Administrators can apply pre-purchased message capacity to Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat before incurring pay-as-you-go charges. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Outlook: Expand and collapse folders when moving emails
description: Users can now expand and collapse folder trees in the move/copy email dialog. This makes it easier to navigate large folder structures and find the right destination faster, improving efficiency and control during email triage. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Expanded Input Box on Copilot Chat
description:
Users will be able to expand the Input Box to a full screen view when they type long prompts with lengthy context or instructions. 
When users copy paste prompts from word editors the prompt box will maintain plain text formatting to sustain readability and review of the prompt.

title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Engage supports 14 more languages
description: Viva Engage now supports 14 additional languages (listed below), making the platform more accessible to global users. This update allows employees to engage in their preferred language, helping improve communication across multilingual teams. Users can navigate to their settings in Viva Engage and choose their preferred language in the drop down under 'Language' settings. The new languages are - 1. Arabic 2. Vietnamese 3. Serbian (Latin) 4. Slovak 5. Croatian 6. Hebrew 7. Slovenian 8. Lithuanian 9. Estonian 10. Bulgarian 11. Latvian12. English (United Kingdom) 13. Spanish (Mexico) 14. French (Canada)

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Increased efficiency with auto-generated Copilot Pages
description: Copilot Chat can automatically create and open a Page side-by-side when it detects a relevant scenario, enabling instant editing, steering, and sharing.

title: Microsoft Viva: News AI audio briefing
description: This feature provides an AI generated audio overview of top 10 news items in the Viva Connections news reader experience. It plays the 10 audio clips sequentially to help users catch up on top news in a hands free manner. This experience will be available in the Viva Connections app in Teams desktop and in the Viva Connections experience in the browser (Accessed from the main Viva home portal - viva.cloud.microsoft).

title: Microsoft Viva: Introducing Viva Engage Role Management APIs on Microsoft Graph
description: We’re excited to announce that Viva Engage Role Management APIs in Microsoft Graph are releasing soon. These new APIs enable IT admins to programmatically manage Viva Engage-specific roles, including Corporate Communicator, Network Administrator and Verified Administrator. With these APIs, one can automate role assignments, retrieve role data, and streamline admin workflows across organization. Previously, roles such as Global Administrator, Yammer Administrator, and Knowledge Manager were already supported via Microsoft Graph through Entra. This update expands that capability to include all Viva Engage roles—bringing greater flexibility and control to your admin experience. The APIs are now available in beta version for allowing users to test and share their feedback as we prepare for the general availability.

title: Microsoft 365: M365 Archive Search
description: M365 Archive will introduce new search capabilities that allow end-users to easily identify archived content. This feature aims to improve productivity by making archived data searchable by end users so they can identify which site needs to be reactivated.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Loss Prevention - restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing on content with sensitivity labels
description: Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention is extended to Microsoft 365 Copilot.  This feature will allow DLP policies to provide detection of sensitivity labels in enterprise grounding data and restrict access of the content in Microsoft 365 Copilot. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Microsoft Edge: Summarization, Translation, and Citation will soon be supported by Microsoft Copilot and Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat in our menus
description: Menus in Edge where the user has highlighted content in the browser will soon support a summarization, translation, and citation with Microsoft Copilot and Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat.

title: Microsoft Places: Microsoft Places Support to GCC cloud
description: Microsoft Places features will now be available in GCC cloud

title: Microsoft Viva: Customize visuals and pages in embedded PowerBI reports
description: Analysts can now use embedded PowerBI edit tools to customize their reports to add visuals, pages and change themes, text and more, and then publish it to their organization.

title: SharePoint: Site attestation
description: Site attestation policy is the newest addition to the site lifecycle management suite. It is a one-stop solution to ensure your sites are secure and compliant by reducing the risk of unmanaged sites. This involves regular reviews by site owners or admins to check and confirm the accuracy of site information, including the site's necessity, its owners, members, permissions, and sharing settings. You can also choose to automate actions on sites that remain unattested for more than 3 months to prevent risks of content over exposure.

title: OneDrive: Sync admin reports - GCC-H and DoD
description: We are adding support for the OneDrive Sync admin reports for the GCC-H and DoD environments.

title: Microsoft Edge: v.142 - Open external links in another profile when recommended by external applications
description: When Microsoft Edge is set as the default browser to open external links from applications, Microsoft Edge must determine which profile to open the links. Users can control which profile to use through the “Default profile for external links” setting. Applications such as Microsoft Teams or Outlook can also recommend a profile for the links. Currently, the user setting is prioritized over application recommendations. With this feature, the application recommended profile is given priority, instead of the profile selected in the setting. Admins can control the availability of the feature using the “EdgeOpenExternalLinksWithAppSpecifiedProfile” policy.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot Dashboard: Team Views
description: Scoped access enables managers to view Copilot insights specific to their own organizations both on the Copilot Dashboard and in additional Copilot reports on the Reports page. This allows leaders at different levels to monitor adoption and impact within their teams, while respecting organizational boundaries and privacy. Admins can configure access criteria and set minimum thresholds.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat - General Availability for the DoD environment
description: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat Copilot is available at no additional cost for Microsoft 365 DOD users who sign in with their Microsoft Entra account (no Microsoft 365 Copilot license required). Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat offers enterprise data protection (EDP), and secure AI chat designed for work, powered by the latest large language models with optional web grounding. The general availability of this release will be delivered to the users with web grounding OFF by default to meet US Government requirements. This will help protect sensitive information which should not leave the DOD compliance boundary.

title: Microsoft Purview: Data Lifecycle Management- Introduction of secure workflow to bypass retention holds and delete content on OneDrive and SharePoint Online
description:
We’re introducing a new capability in Microsoft Purview Data Lifecycle Management to bypass retention policies and delete content from OneDrive and SharePoint Online before the hold or retention policy duration expires. This feature helps organizations manage Copilot-related artifacts—such as Teams recordings and transcripts—independently of OneDrive retention polices, so organizations can decide how long they want to keep and when to delete this content.
The feature includes support for simulation testing, audit, and disposition reviews, and introduces admin policy authoring flows. These flows are governed by Microsoft Purview role groups to enable the creation and enforcement of defensible deletion policies. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Microsoft Teams: Saved messages
description: Quickly get back to important information without scrolling through long conversations. You can save messages, whether it is a post, a reply or chat message, and find them later in the Saved view in your Chat or Teams list. Click on a saved message to open the full conversation in the right pane, where you can review or reply directly.

title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Amplify - Support for click through rate metric in Amplify reporting
description: This release will enhance Amplify reporting by adding click through rate metric. A new card will show the percentage of unique users who clicked on a link from the publication, providing insights into user engagement with the campaign.

title: Microsoft Teams: Noise Suppression for Dial-In Participants in Teams Audio Conferences
description:
Microsoft Teams will soon support noise suppression for dial-in participants. This feature automatically filters out background noise (e.g., traffic, typing) for users who join meetings via phone (PSTN). It enhances clarity and reduces distractions for all meeting participants. The feature will be rolled out gradually. However, if you'd like to enable it yourself, you will be able to do so via the Teams Admin Center:
1. Go to Meeting policy 2. Navigate to the Audio & video section 3. Set Noise suppression for dial-in participants to Enabled or programmatically with MicrosoftTeamsPowerShell by setting NoiseSuppressionForDialInParticipants setting inside of CsTeamsMeetingPolicy to "Enabled".

title: SharePoint: Support for click through rate metric in page analytics
description: This release will enhance SharePoint page analytics by adding click through rate metric. A new card will show the percentage of unique viewers who clicked on a link from the news post, providing insights into user engagement with the post.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Access Copilot Chat in your Microsoft 365 apps
description: Easily access Copilot Chat from the side pane in your Microsoft 365 apps with a commercial Microsoft 365 license or a Microsoft 365 Copilot license.

title: Microsoft Teams: Front-of-room view control for Town Hall and Webinar in Teams Rooms on Windows
description: When a Teams Rooms on Windows is invited as a meeting presenter, the front-of-room display defaults to the attendee view. Presenters always have full control from the console, including green room and off-stage management, and can switch the front-of-room display to presenter view without impacting attendees. Available in Teams Rooms Pro.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Content Sources in Copilot Chat
description: Users will able to select content sources on Copilot Chat. When users select content sources the responses generated will be limited to content from the selected sources.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Information Protection - On demand classification for files on Windows devices
description: This capability will enable organizations to scan files on Windows devices for sensitive information to meet data discovery requirements for regulatory purposes and inform data security posture accordingly.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Use Copilot to rephrase text as desired through custom prompt in PowerPoint
description: Now you will be able to rewrite text using Copilot through natural language prompting in PowerPoint.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Use Copilot to rephrase text as desired through custom prompt in PowerPoint
description: Now you will be able to rewrite text using Copilot through natural language prompting in PowerPoint.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Endpoint Data Loss Prevention Always-on diagnostics for Windows endpoints (Phase 1)
description: This feature release ‘Always-on diagnostics’, captures critical diagnostic data from onboarded endpoint devices running on Windows OS for EDLP issue reporting. Comprehensive trace logs will be automatically recorded and stored locally on the devices, eliminating the need to reproduce issues when submitting investigation requests to Microsoft. It allows for the collection of detailed traces over extended periods (up to 90 days). While raising tickets to submit investigation requests to Microsoft regarding Microsoft Endpoint  DLP, customers can share enhanced diagnostic information with Microsoft without needing to reproduce the exact scenario.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Use Copilot to rephrase text as desired through custom prompt in PowerPoint
description: Now you will be able to rewrite text using Copilot through natural language prompting in PowerPoint.

title: Outlook: add attachments while offline in the new Outlook for Windows
description: We are adding more functionality to offline mode in the new Outlook for Windows. You will now be able to add attachments while drafting your email without an internet connection. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Edge: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat access to page content will soon extend to work across multiple open tabs
description: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat in Edge will soon be able to answer contextual questions about a user's open window. This extends the existing capability which can only access the open page. All existing user settings and policies and DLP considerations will continue to be respected.

title: Microsoft 365 Admin Center: Agent-Level Controls for Pay-as-you-go
description: This feature introduces admin controls for managing AI agents on a consumption basis within Microsoft 365 Copilot. Administrators can specify which users can access particular agents through pay-as-you-go, control which agents are available for metered consumption, and establish billing policy for each agent. Initially focusing on declarative agents in M365 Copilot Chat and SharePoint, this enhancement enables organizations to effectively manage AI consumption costs and scale intelligent capabilities according to business needs. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Outlook: Data Loss Prevention (DLP) Policy Tips & Override for Outlook Mobile
description: Outlook Mobile now supports Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy tips, helping users avoid accidental data leaks. When sensitive content is detected, users are alerted with inline tips or pop-ups, based on admin-configured rules. This update aligns DLP behavior across all Outlook clients for consistent compliance enforcement.

title: Outlook: Folder Deletion Warning for Rules
description: Outlook will show warning when you try to delete a folder that's used in a rule. This helps prevent accidental rule breakage and ensures your email flow remains uninterrupted. You'll be prompted to review or update affected rules before the folder is removed. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Folder Deletion Warning for Rules
description: Outlook will show warning when you try to delete a folder that's used in a rule. This helps prevent accidental rule breakage and ensures your email flow remains uninterrupted. You'll be prompted to review or update affected rules before the folder is removed. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Rule to display desktop alert
description: Create rules that trigger a desktop alert when specific emails arrive. This makes it easier to stay on top of important messages without missing a beat. Look for the new "Display a Desktop Alert" action when setting up or editing your rules. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Rule to display desktop alert
description: Create rules that trigger a desktop alert when specific emails arrive. This makes it easier to stay on top of important messages without missing a beat. Look for the new "Display a Desktop Alert" action when setting up or editing your rules. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Purview Information Protection - Support for Cross Cloud Protected Files
description: This feature will enable customers working across cloud boundaries - worldwide cloud to GCC High or Microsoft 365 operated by 21-Vianet, to share files protected with Purview Information Protection sensitivity labels. Recipients in the other cloud will be able to view, edit, print, and more based on rights assigned by the document owner.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): See a summary from Copilot of the latest changes and comments in the Word, Excel, and PowerPoint backstage view.
description: Use Copilot in the backstage view, accessible from the tile tab or start menu, to see a summary of the latest changes and comments made to your Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files before opening them.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Add topic(s) through Copilot to your existing presentation
description: Now, you will be able to add more content to your existing presentation using Copilot. It would help you generate/add new topic(s) with slides that are consistent in look and feel of your existing presentations

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Add topic(s) through Copilot to your existing presentation
description: Now, you will be able to add more content to your existing presentation using Copilot. It would help you generate/add new topic(s) with slides that are consistent in look and feel of your existing presentations

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Add topic(s) through Copilot to your existing presentation
description: Now, you will be able to add more content to your existing presentation using Copilot. It would help you generate/add new topic(s) with slides that are consistent in look and feel of your existing presentations

title: Microsoft Viva: Manage GDPR requests in Engage admin center
description: You can now manage GDPR deletion requests directly within the Engage admin center, streamlining the process and reducing reliance on the legacy Yammer admin center. This update centralizes compliance actions in one modern interface.

title: Microsoft Teams: Usability and privacy improvements for live captions and live transcript in meetings
description: Introducing enhancements to live captions and live transcripts in Microsoft Teams to make meetings more intuitive, accessible, and privacy-focused. Live captions are now scrollable, allowing users to review past conversation with more flexibility and over a larger surface area. Next, copying captions is disabled by default to protect sensitive information and support compliance. Additionally, the live transcript panel won’t open automatically with features that trigger transcription—like recording, giving users greater control over their layout. Lastly, If transcription is enabled, users who attempt to open the live transcript panel will see a banner suggesting they switch to live captions for real-time comprehension. These updates streamline the experience while supporting accessibility and privacy.

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Frontier and Microsoft agent user request approval flow in Microsoft 365 admin center
description: For Admins, agents in the Frontier program can be managed through the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. They are listed under the agents & connectors tab in Copilot Control System, where you can view all agent inventory for your organization. Agents built by Microsoft and available in the Frontier program will be displayed in the Agent Store. This feature will support users to request these agents if blocked by organizational policies. Admins will have the opportunity to further approve and reject these user request. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Continue editing in Outlook from Copilot Chat
description: When Copilot detects that you're trying to write an email—like saying “Draft an email to my team thanking them for their hard work on Project K”—you’ll see an “Edit in Outlook” button. The 'Edit in Outlook button will open a draft in Outlook, with the subject, message, and recipients filled in, so you can review and send it with ease.

title: Microsoft Edge: A Refreshed Profile Flyout Experience for Better Clarity and Actionability
description: We’re updating the Microsoft Edge profile flyout to deliver a cleaner, more intuitive experience. The refreshed design makes it easier to distinguish between work and personal profiles, manage credentials, and quickly access key settings—all within a polished interface that supports modern browsing needs. With streamlined sign-in, clearer profile types, and organization branding preserved, this update enables a more efficient and trustworthy experience for customers.

title: Microsoft Teams: Unified building and endpoint metadata for reporting
description: Teams Administrators can now use a single, unified process to upload and maintain the building and endpoint metadata that enriches calling and meeting reports. This new process replaces Reporting Labels and ensures that the building and endpoint information you upload is used in both Tenant Admin Center and Call Quality Dashboard.

title: Outlook: Show teammates' calendars in the left navigation pane
description: Users can now see their teammates' calendars (including peers, direct reports, and managers) automatically displayed in the left navigation pane of the new outlook. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Schedule from email with Copilot
description: Often you may want to transition a conversation from an email thread to a meeting. Copilot helps you do this by being able to start scheduling right from the email conversation. It saves you time and effort by generating a meeting invite that's ready for you to review and send. When you click on "Schedule with Copilot" a meeting form will appear with a Copilot generated meeting title, agenda, and conversation summary as well as a pre-filled attendee list from the email thread and an attachment of the original email thread. This feature will be available in the new Outlook for Windows, web, Mac, and mobile. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Catchup on important emails in Copilot Chat
description: Copilot Chat helps you stay on top of your inbox by highlighting important and actionable emails such as messages from your manager, leadership, top collaborators, or emails containing tasks when you use prompts like “What’s hot in my inbox?” or “What were the important emails from last week?”

title: Microsoft Teams: New Workflows app experience in Teams and SharePoint
description: The new Workflows app is to provide an experience that is both simpler and faster to enable everyday Teams and SharePoint users to create automations in three steps or less. Fully launched in Teams and coming to SharePoint lists and libraries soon.

title: Microsoft Teams: Apply partial settings for Android devices using configuration profiles in the Teams admin center
description: In the Teams admin center, admins can now modify, review, and apply configuration settings to Android devices without overriding other settings ensuring only the desired changes are made.

title: Microsoft Teams: Slash commands for apps
description: You can now interact with your favorite apps directly from Teams chat and channels compose box using slash commands.  Type / and start interacting with Apps and Agents, invoke workflows and more.

title: Microsoft 365: Microsoft 365 Backup capabilities available in GCC
description: We are bringing Microsoft 365 Backup Service capabilities to GCC. Microsoft 365 Backup is a product offering spanning across the OneDrive, SharePoint, and Exchange Online services that provides customers with a consistent, cross product solution, to recover their M365 data from cataclysmic events such as: at scale ransomware attacks, or malicious/accidental data deletion/corruption by end users.

title: Microsoft Teams: Browser support on Teams Rooms on Windows touch boards
description: Teams Rooms on Windows-based touch boards, including the Surface Hub 3, now feature a private browsing mode with Microsoft Edge. This functionality allows users to access websites and line-of-business web applications on touch boards both during meetings and outside of them. IT administrators can manage browsing policies to ensure a secure and safe browsing experience.

title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: OCR - Restrict OCR Scan to mails sent outside the organization
description: The feature will allow you to do OCR for only those mails which are being sent outside the organization. Hence, by using this config, you will not be billed for any internal communications or any incoming mails coming from outside the org.

title: Microsoft Teams: Countdown Timer for Teams Meetings
description: Manage time and streamline meeting discussions with the new countdown timer for Teams meetings, a tool designed to keep meetings efficient and on schedule. Any user can easily add a timer of any duration to the meeting (up to 100 minutes), which will appear in the meeting window for all participants with controls to start, stop, pause, and add more time. Colors automatically change as the timer gets closer to zero to help keep the speaker on track.

title: Outlook: Editor (Proofing and Spellcheck) for GCC Mod
description: Automatic spelling and grammar checking when composing an email message. Corrections are underlined on the draft, and clicking on them reveals suggested corrections. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Insert Graphic
description: When composing a message in the new Outlook for Windows and Outlook on the web, there will be a new Graphics button under the Insert ribbon tab. This opens a panel that will allow users to search and pick from a large selection of emoji, stock photos, and stickers, which are inserted into the message when selected. #newoutlookforwindows

title: Outlook: Editor (Proofing and Spellcheck)
description: Automatic spelling and grammar checking when composing an email message. Corrections are underlined on the draft, and clicking on them reveals suggested corrections.

title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Dashboard - Benchmarks
description: Compare Copilot active usage with benchmarks in Copilot Dashboard. External benchmarks will provide a reference for how usage compares to other companies. Internal benchmarks will enable users to compare similar groups, within your company. #copilotcontrolsystem

title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Dashboard - Enhanced scope drilldown
description: Leaders and managers can drilldown and explore data in Copilot Dashboard by indirect groups, unlocking a new layer of visibility into Copilot adoption and impact. #copilotcontrolsystem
